About the Project

A New Standard
for Midnapore

Royale Enclave I is Rabindranagar's most anticipated address — a thoughtfully designed G+10 building that combines premium residential living with strategic commercial spaces at the ground level.

Each floor spans 6,693 sq.ft of built-up area, offering 7 distinct flat configurations from a cosy 1 BHK to a spacious 3 BHK, crafted with meticulous attention to space efficiency, natural light, and ventilation.

  • RCC Framed Structure
  • Earthquake Resistant
  • 2 High-Speed Lifts
  • Power Backup
  • CCTV Surveillance
  • Rooftop Garden
  • Rooftop Temple
  • Meditation Area
  • Fire Safety System
  • Rainwater Harvesting
  • Free Branded Geyser
Commercial Spaces

Ground Floor Commercial Hub

Prime Location
🏢
Commercial Spaces
Ground Floor · Rabindranagar Main Road

Premium commercial units on the ground floor facing the main road — ideal for retail showrooms, clinics, professional offices, restaurants, and branded outlets. High footfall, excellent street visibility.

  • ◆ Floor-to-ceiling glass frontage for maximum visibility and brand presence
  • ◆ High ceilings (12 ft) with flexible open layouts for any commercial use
  • ◆ Separate entrance and independent utility connections
  • ◆ Located on prime Rabindranagar road with excellent connectivity to all of Midnapore
  • ◆ Ideal for medical clinics, retail stores, cafes, or professional offices
Enquire for Commercial

Living Experience

World-Class Amenities

🛗
Dual Lifts
Two high-speed passenger lifts — 1 Passenger Lift (4'6"×5'6") and 1 Utility Lift (6'5"×6'0") for effortless daily mobility.
🔒
24/7 Security
Round-the-clock security with CCTV at all entry points, corridors, and parking areas.
⚡
Power Backup
100% power backup for common areas, lifts, and security systems — uninterrupted living guaranteed.
🚗
Covered Parking
Dedicated covered parking for residents with separate visitor parking provisions.
🌿
Rooftop Garden
Beautifully landscaped rooftop garden with sitting areas, green spaces, and open-air relaxation zones for residents.
🛕
Rooftop Temple
Dedicated rooftop temple space for prayer and spiritual wellbeing — a peaceful sacred space for all residents.
🧘
Meditation Area
Serene rooftop meditation and yoga zone with calm surroundings — the perfect space for daily mindfulness practice.
🔥
Fire Safety
Comprehensive fire detection and suppression throughout the building as per NBC norms.
💧
Rainwater Harvesting
Eco-conscious rainwater harvesting system for sustainable and responsible water management.
📡
Intercom & DTH
Video intercom system and provision for DTH, high-speed internet in every flat.
Limited Period

10% Booking Discount

🔑 Start Here
🏠
Book from ₹2,00,000
Secure your dream home at Royale Enclave I with a minimum booking amount of just ₹2,00,000. Simple, affordable, and flexible — the easiest entry into Midnapore's most premium address.
Min. booking ₹2,00,000 · Book your flat today
🎁 Free Gift
🍳
Semi Modular Kitchen Gift
For the first 10 bookings — receive a fully fitted semi modular kitchen (worth ₹1.5 Lakhs) absolutely free. Move-in ready, zero extra spend needed.
Worth ₹1.5 Lakhs — First 10 bookings only
📈
Zero Floor Rise
Book any floor — Ground to Top — at the same price. No floor rise charges. Choose your preferred view and height without paying a premium for it.
All floors · Same rate · No surcharge
💳
Flexible Payment Plan
Pay as construction progresses with convenient milestone-linked plans. 10:80:10 or customised payment structures available. Home loans facilitated via all major banks.
Bank loans facilitated · All major banks
🚿
Free Branded Geyser
Every flat at Royale Enclave I comes with a free branded electric geyser — premium quality, installed and ready to use from day one.
Free with every flat · Branded · Pre-installed
🎖️
Referral Reward
Refer a friend or family member who books a flat and earn ₹25,000 as a referral bonus, paid on their possession. Build your community, earn rewards.
₹25,000 cash reward per successful referral
Prime Address

Located at the Heart of
Rabindranagar, Midnapore

Royale Enclave I sits in Rabindranagar — Midnapore's most sought-after neighbourhood — with top hospitals, schools, transit hubs, and markets all within easy reach.
